name: read-and-summarize
description: Read multiple files in the workspace and produce a one-paragraph summary.

files.alpha.txt: Alpha is the first letter of the Greek alphabet. It represents the beginning of things.
files.beta.txt: Beta is the second letter. It often denotes a software release that is feature-complete but unstable.
files.gamma.txt: Gamma is the third letter, frequently used in physics to denote a ratio of specific heats or a type of radiation.

goal: Read alpha.txt, beta.txt, and gamma.txt in the current directory. Then write a single-paragraph summary (3-4 sentences) into summary.md describing what each file says.
